summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SaaS SEO Automation platform. Backend APIs working well (84% success rate), all pricing correct, frontend UI loading properly but authentication integration has issues.

flaky_endpoints.workaround: Authentication system working in main server but SaaS module has token validation issues
Same authentication issue as subscription endpoint
Same authentication issue affecting BYOAK functionality

integration_issues.issue: Registration form submission doesn't redirect to dashboard

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections (hero, features, pricing preview, testimonials, CTA)
Pricing page shows all 4 plans with correct prices (€19, €49, €99, €199)
Navigation between public pages works correctly
Route protection works (redirects to login for protected pages)
Backend SaaS plans API returns correct plan data
Backend authentication APIs work (register/login in backend tests)
Backend article, calendar, keywords, backlinks APIs working
Frontend UI structure and design properly implemented
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend-backend authentication integration: 1) Registration form not redirecting after successful submission, 2) Login form returning 401 errors, 3) SaaS-specific endpoints (/api/saas/subscription, /api/saas/subscription/usage, /api/saas/api-keys) not working with authentication token from main server
